pattern: From the chosen cell, scan each of the eight directions for a run of opposite-color cells terminated by a same-color cell, forming a good line.
hints: After placing your color, the cell must be the endpoint of a straight line whose interior is entirely the opposite color and which ends in your color.
Check all eight directions independently; a direction qualifies only if the very next cell is the opposite color.
Walk outward while cells are the opposite color; if you then hit your own color (with at least one opposite cell between), that direction yields a good line and the move is legal.

edge_inputs.description: legal move with two good lines
good lines exist only with the cell as a middle, so illegal
horizontal good line of exactly three
only opposite color in a direction, never closed, illegal
adjacent same color gives no interior, illegal

stress.description: random 8x8 board with a forced empty target cell
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    board = [[rng.choice(['.', 'W', 'B']) for _ in range(8)] for _ in range(8)]
    r = rng.randrange(8)
    c = rng.randrange(8)
    board[r][c] = '.'
    color = rng.choice(['W', 'B'])
    return [board, r, c, color]
stress.note: target cell is always free as the constraints require
